overall.description: Gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket exploring a dimly lit abandoned hospital. The character walks through corridors, enters rooms, and eventually reaches a greenhouse area with overgrown vegetation visible through a glass ceiling. The atmosphere is tense and atmospheric with flashlight illumination and detailed UE5 graphics.

events.description: character passes a dead creature lying on the corridor floor
character approaches and opens the double doors marked INNER WARD

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously down the dimly lit hospital corridor, flashlight illuminating the path ahead

entered.detail: pale green painted walls with wooden handrails and medical signage
framed informational poster on the corridor wall
grotesque deceased monster lying in a pool of blood on the floor
empty metal hospital gurney against the wall
double doors with frosted glass windows marked INNER WARD
metal rack with pamphlets near the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dimly lit hospital corridor with pale green walls and medical posters. A dead creature lies on the floor near a medical cart. The character approaches the INNER WARD double doors at the end of the hall, creating a tense atmosphere with flashlight illumination.

events.description: character passes through the INNER WARD doors into a darker corridor with exposed ceiling pipes
character turns right to approach a side room door

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the doorway into a darker maintenance corridor with exposed infrastructure overhead

entered.detail: rusted ventilation ducts and electrical conduits visible on the ceiling
wooden door with frosted glass panel leading to a side room

segments.scene_description: Passing through the INNER WARD doors, the scene shifts to a darker maintenance corridor with exposed ceiling pipes and deteriorating conditions. The character walks forward and turns toward a side room door on the right, leaving the previous hallway behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: hospital lounge with kitchenette and seating area

events.description: character enters the green-walled lounge room with kitchen facilities
character turns around to survey the room and examine different areas

agents.ego_description: entering a lounge area and looking around, examining the kitchen counter, couch, and shelves methodically

entered.detail: wooden cabinets with sink and medical supplies on the counter
old white fridge against the back wall
worn leather sofa with wooden frame
wooden table with debris and a plant on top
tall shelf filled with books and medical supplies
round analog clock on the green wall
white heating unit under the window
door leading back to the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a green-walled lounge room containing a kitchenette area with refrigerator and cabinets, a seating area with a leather couch and coffee table, and medical supply shelves. The character explores the space, turning to examine different corners before heading toward the exit door.

events.description: character exits the lounge back into the corridor
character enters a tiled bathroom area with shower stalls and benches
character breaks through a window to enter the greenhouse area

agents.ego_description: leaving the lounge room, walking through corridors, and entering a bathroom facility before breaking through to an exterior area

entered.detail: red fire bell mounted on the wall
cork board with papers pinned to it
white ceramic tiles covering the bathroom walls
wooden bench for changing clothes
opaque glass door at the end of the bathroom
enclosed shower cubicles with curtains
blue padded benches in the shower area
exposed brickwork in the shower room
window with shattered glass leading to the greenhouse

segments.scene_description: The character exits the lounge back into the corridor, passing a fire alarm and bulletin board, then enters a tiled bathroom facility with shower stalls and benches. The character proceeds through the bathroom and breaks through a window to access the next area, transitioning from interior to a glass-enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown greenhouse conservatory with glass ceiling

events.description: character enters the greenhouse with glass ceiling and overgrown vegetation
character stops and looks up at the glass ceiling with moonlight filtering through

agents.ego_description: walking through the greenhouse, looking up at the overgrown glass ceiling and approaching a door at the far end

notable_agents.action: mysterious figure visible through the frosted glass of the exit door ahead

entered.detail: large glass panels overhead with vines growing across them, moonlight filtering through
thick green vines covering the glass walls and ceiling structure
transparent panels showing exterior darkness and foliage outside
wooden framed glass door leading to the next area
large planters with overgrown vegetation
storage racks with gardening supplies

segments.scene_description: The character enters a large greenhouse conservatory with a glass ceiling covered in overgrown vines. Moonlight filters through the foliage overhead, creating an eerie atmosphere. The character walks past potted plants and metal shelving toward a glass door at the far end, where a mysterious figure is visible through the frosted glass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a decaying hospital interior that gradually opens into a moonlit, overgrown conservatory. It begins in a narrow, dimly lit corridor with pale green walls and medical posters, moving past a dead creature and a medical cart toward the inner ward double doors. As the camera passes through these doors, the environment shifts into a darker maintenance hallway with exposed ceiling pipes before turning into a green-walled lounge furnished with a kitchenette and leather seating. The scene then transitions back into the corridor and through a tiled bathroom facility, where the character breaks through a window to leave the sterile interior behind. Finally, the space expands into a large greenhouse conservatory where moonlight filters through a vine-covered glass ceiling, leading the camera past potted plants toward a mysterious figure visible through a frosted glass door.
